things.name: Santa Maria Beach
things.description: Stunning turquoise bay with white sand - Cape Verde's most popular resort beach

things.name: Windsurfing & Kitesurfing
things.description: Sal's constant trade winds make it one of the world's best wind sports destinations

things.name: Pedra de Lume Salt Lake
things.description: Crater lake of pink salt - float like the Dead Sea and have a natural salt scrub

things.name: Shark Bay Snorkelling
things.description: Reef snorkelling with nurse sharks, rays and sea turtles

things.name: Espargos Market
things.description: Sal's main town market with Cape Verdean music, grogue rum and local crafts

things.name: Murdeira Bay
things.description: Dramatic bay with sea caves, cliffs and excellent diving on the north coast

things.name: Baby Hatchery (Sea Turtle Project)
things.description: Visit the loggerhead sea turtle hatchery - Sal has the second largest nesting site in Africa

things.name: Fogo Volcano Day Trip
things.description: Fly to Fogo island to hike the active 2,829m volcano

things.name: Santiago Island (Cidade Velha)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage first European city in the tropics

things.name: Cachupa Stew
things.description: Cape Verde's national dish - slow-cooked corn, beans and whatever meat is available
